title: delphinium peregrinum subsp. nanum
intro: Delphinium peregrinum subsp. nanum, also known as dwarf delphinium or miniature larkspur, is a species of flowering plant in the family Ranunculaceae. It is a small, perennial plant that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Delphinium peregrinum subsp. nanum can be prepared into herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to be used for medicinal purposes.
